description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a dark, textured upholstery that appears to be made of synthetic leather or tightly woven fabric. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and have a subtle seam running down the center. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric silhouette. The base of the sofa is supported by four short, square wooden legs, finished in a dark brown tone that contrasts slightly with the upholstery. The upholstery has a subtle, repeating chevron or cable-knit pattern, adding visual interest and a tactile quality to the surface. Overall, the design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A modern, dark-colored sofa with boxy armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and a subtle textured pattern. Supported by four short, square wooden legs, it has a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the cushions, and the short wooden leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, patterned backrest and the sofa's rectangular silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion thickness, with another visible corner leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at each end, equal in height to the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, square wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and finished in a dark brown tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached back cushions, no tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle, repeating chevron or cable-knit pattern, providing a textured and visually interesting surface.
